title: CXCL1 Supplementation on iPSC-Derived Midbrain Neurons
author: Elena Coccia

steps.title: On day 25 of differentiation, plate...
steps.instruction: On day 25 of differentiation, plate primary midbrain neurons under standard culture conditions. Add 100,000 neurons per well off a 96w plate (100µl). Incubate at 37 °C, 5% CO2 for 24 hours.

steps.title: Prepare recombinant CXCL1 stock and initiate treatment
steps.instruction: Prepare recombinant CXCL1 stock and initiate treatment. Reconstitute CXCL1 in 0.1% BSA in PBS to a final concentration of 1 mg/ml. Dilute to working concentrations (1 ng/ml, 10 ng/ml, 50 ng/ml, 100 ng/ml) in astrocyte conditioned media.

steps.title: On day 26, perform the first...
steps.instruction: On day 26, perform the first half media change with supplemented CM or vehicle-only CM for controls. Remove 50% of the existing media volume (50 µl) and replace with an equal volume (250 µl) of freshly prepared supplemented CM. For controls, use 0.1% BSA in PBS.

steps.title: Continue half media changes every other day for four weeks
steps.instruction: Continue half media changes every other day for four weeks.

steps.title: At the end of the four-week...
steps.instruction: At the end of the four-week exposure period, proceed to downstream analyses.
